original_statement: after a game at dumaguete city, what venue comes next?
mutated_statement: after something at somewhere, what something comes next?
mutation_analysis: Named-entity generalization + Noun generalization + Specificity removal: Proper place name generalized | Concrete event and object nouns replaced by placeholders (dumaguete city → somewhere | a game → something | venue → something)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志多处critique和judge_thought明确指出问题模糊性，例如iteration 1/after_refine与多次judge_thought中反复写到“问题是underspecified/不明确/缺少信息/无法确定”等字样，表明agent意识到目标不明确。但在iteration 5的after_refine中，agent仍然尝试给出具体答案（在chain里出现“february 11|mobiline”并附解释：“Starting from the row with… the immediate next entry is on February 11 against Mobiline…”），说明其在觉察模糊后选择基于假设进行猜测并输出具体结果。综上，agent既承认问题不明确又给出具体推测性答案，符合“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”分类。
